title: Syrian-Style Pistachio Savory Pastry
description: A flavorful and flaky pastry filled with a rich savory pistachio mixture. Perfect for a snack or light meal.
instructions: Roll out the flaky pastry dough to a thickness of about 1/8 inch. Cut out circles of dough using a cookie cutter or the rim of a glass.
In a bowl, mix together pistachio meal, savory crumb, and salt.
Place a spoonful of the pistachio mixture in the center of each pastry circle.
Brush the edges of the pastry with water, then fold the dough in half to form a triangle or a square shape.
Press the edges together to seal the pastry. Use a fork to crimp the edges and create a decorative border.
Place the pastries on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Brush the tops of the pastries with a little water and sprinkle with additional savory crumb if desired.
Bake the pastries for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown.
Serve warm or at room temperature.
